title: After pivoting, Y Combinator grad Glimpse raises $35M led by a16z
summary: Glimpse announced on Wednesday a $35 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz, with participation from 8VC and YC.
ai_summary: Y Combinator graduate Glimpse has secured $35 million in Series A funding led by Andreessen Horowitz.

title: Doss raises $55M for AI inventory management that plugs into ERP
summary: Doss's AI-powered inventory management system integrates with existing ERP systems. The Series B round was co-led by Madrona and Premji Invest.
ai_summary: Doss secured $55 million in a Series B round led by Madrona and Premji Invest to expand its AI inventory management platform that integrates with existing ERP systems.

title: Despite bitter rivalry, Kalshi, Polymarket CEOs back $35M predictions markets VC fund
summary: As prediction markets explode, the new firm called 5(c) Capital, will back startups supporting the burgeoning category.
ai_summary: The CEOs of rival prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket are jointly backing a new $35 million venture capital fund to invest in startups within the sector.

title: Amid legal turmoil, Kalshi is temporarily banned in Nevada
summary: It's the latest escalation in a regulatory battle over the future of prediction markets.
ai_summary: Nevada has temporarily banned Kalshi amid escalating legal disputes over prediction markets.

title: Polymarket continues its partnership spree with a Major League Baseball deal
summary: MLB is only the latest in a string of recently announced partnerships involving the prediction market.
ai_summary: Polymarket has expanded its partnership portfolio by securing a deal with Major League Baseball, following a series of recent collaborations.

title: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are still open
summary: Nominate your startup, or one you know, for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 before May 27. Chance to win $100,000 equity-free funding and VC access.
ai_summary: TechCrunch is accepting nominations for its Startup Battlefield 200 until May 27, offering a chance to win $100,000 in equity-free funding and venture capital access.

title: Kalshi’s legal troubles pile up, as Arizona files first ever criminal charges over ‘illegal gambling business’
summary: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims it's not beholden to them.
ai_summary: Arizona has filed the first criminal charges against Kalshi, accusing the prediction market platform of running an illegal gambling operation amid ongoing regulatory disputes.

title: Fuse raises $25M  to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
summary: The startup also announced a $5 million "rescue fund" to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.
ai_summary: Fuse has secured $25 million to modernize loan systems for U.S. credit unions, including a $5 million fund to assist in transitioning from outdated software to its AI-driven platform.

title: Walmart-backed PhonePe shelves IPO as global tensions rattle markets
summary: PhonePe has paused its planned IPO, delaying a major liquidity event for investors including Tiger Global and Microsoft.
ai_summary: PhonePe has postponed its IPO due to global market instability, delaying returns for key investors.

title: India neobank Fi winds down banking services on its platform
summary: Fi, founded by former Google Pay executives, is discontinuing banking services over four years after launch.
ai_summary: Fi, a neobank started by ex-Google Pay leaders, is shutting down its banking operations after more than four years.

title: In a vote of confidence for Meta’s Threads, Kalshi adds sharing feature
summary: Kalshi now offers a share option that will automatically embed the relevant prediction market chart into a Threads post.
ai_summary: Kalshi has integrated a feature allowing users to share prediction market charts directly into Meta's Threads posts.

title: X taps William Shatner to give out invites to its payments service, X Money
summary: 42 X users donated to William Shatner's charity in exchange for an early invite to X Money beta.
ai_summary: X has enlisted William Shatner to distribute early beta invites for its X Money payments service through charitable donations.

title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
summary: Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.
ai_summary: Stripe is introducing a tool to help AI companies manage and profit from their AI model expenses.

title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
summary: The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).
ai_summary: SoftBank-backed PayPay's IPO is reportedly delayed due to geopolitical tensions, despite aiming for a $10 billion valuation.

title: Polymarket saw $529M traded on bets tied to bombing of Iran
summary: Six newly-created accounts made a profit of $1 million by correctly betting that the U.S. would strike Iran by February 28.
ai_summary: Six new accounts on Polymarket earned $1 million by accurately predicting a U.S. strike on Iran before February 28, with total bets on the event reaching $529 million.
